name: legacy-project-analyzer
description: Analyze legacy projects and generate comprehensive documentation including GDD, technical architecture, and gap analysis

skill.name: Legacy-Project-Analyzer
skill.description: Automated legacy project analysis tool that scans codebases, identifies gaps in documentation, and generates Game Design Documents (GDD), Technical Architecture Documents, and implementation plans. Supports config analysis, core system analysis, network protocol analysis, and client architecture review.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Quick surface scan of project structure and identify missing documentation

commands.name: full_analysis
commands.description: Complete analysis including config, core, network, and client modules

commands.name: analyze_config
commands.description: Analyze configuration files and generate config documentation

commands.name: analyze_core
commands.description: Analyze core game systems and generate core documentation

commands.name: analyze_network
commands.description: Analyze network protocols and generate network documentation

commands.name: analyze_client
commands.description: Analyze client architecture and generate client documentation

commands.name: synthesize
commands.description: Synthesize all analysis outputs into final GDD

examples: openclaw skill run Legacy-Project-Analyzer scan D:\PROJECT\CCN2\clientccn2
openclaw skill run Legacy-Project-Analyzer full_analysis D:\PROJECT\CCN2\clientccn2 --output-dir D:\PROJECT\CCN2\clientccn2\document
